title: dev_brief result
description: The pipeline's terminal record: the disposition, cycle accounting, the branch the work landed on, the final artifacts (dev report, gate outcome, every lens verdict), and every derive-and-check violation. Exhaustion is a disposition, never a silent success.

verdict_mismatches.description: Cycle-stamped derive-and-check violations and lost lenses — operator evidence.

verification.description: The post-accept verification stage's outcome (pass, pre_clean/post_clean assertions, per-command runs, log file path). Present only on an accepted run that configured a non-empty verify_gates battery; null otherwise. Recorded evidence — never a disposition change.
